hero.badge: 100% Free · Community Built · Open to Everyone
hero.subheadline: No fees. No catches. Just clear, honest guidance for students and families navigating New Zealand's education system.

features.heading: Built by students, for students
features.subtitle: Navigate NZ breaks down the confusing parts of the education system into simple, actionable steps.
features.understandDesc: School jargon decoded — year levels, NCEA, zoning, and more explained like a friend would
features.findPathDesc: Answer a few questions and see exactly where you stand — no sign-up pressure, no sales pitch
features.trackProgressDesc: Free step-by-step modules you can work through at your own pace

testimonials.heading: From our community
testimonials.subtitle: Navigate NZ is built by first-gen students who've been where you are

helpSection.heading: How we help — for free, forever
helpSection.subtitle: From understanding the basics to tracking your journey — we've got every step covered.
helpSection.row1desc: Free guides written in plain language — no education jargon, no paywalls
helpSection.row2desc: A quick self-assessment to understand your situation — your data stays private, always
helpSection.row3desc: Short learning modules you complete at your own pace — no deadlines, no pressure

quickStart.heading: Not sure where to start?
quickStart.subtitle: Choose your role and we'll point you in the right direction

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to your personalised university pathway
howItWorks.step1desc: Answer a few quick questions about where you are and where you want to go.
howItWorks.step2desc: We'll create a custom roadmap based on your year level, school, and goals.
howItWorks.step3: Complete modules at your own pace
howItWorks.step3desc: Work through guides and track your progress — all free, all in plain language.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: It's free, it's simple, and it's built for students just like you.

guidesPage.title: Free Guides
guidesPage.subtitle: In-depth articles explaining how NZ's education system works. Read them anytime — no account needed.
guidesPage.qualWarning: NZ's qualification system is changing. The information in these guides applies to students currently in Years 10-13 (graduating by 2029). We'll update as details are confirmed.

modulesPage.title: Free Action Modules
modulesPage.subtitle: Practical steps to keep you on track. Check off each action as you complete it.
modulesPage.signInToSave: Sign in to save your progress
modulesPage.actionChecklist: Action checklist · Check off each step as you complete it
modulesPage.greatWork: Great work — you're making real progress.

assessment.heading: See where you stand
assessment.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions — completely free, completely private. We'll show you where you are and what to focus on next.
assessment.resultHeading: Here's where you stand — and what to do next
assessment.resultSub: Here's a summary of what you told us

dashboard.subtitle: Your personal overview — free forever, no strings attached
dashboard.noAssessment: You haven't taken the assessment yet
dashboard.noAssessmentSub: Take our quick assessment so we can personalise your pathway to university.

auth.createAccountSub: Join Navigate NZ — it's free, always.
auth.welcomeBackSub: Sign in to continue your journey
auth.resetSub: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.newPasswordSub: Choose a strong password for your account

about.heroSub: Because every student deserves to understand how the system works — especially when no one in your family has been through it before.
about.alwaysFreeSub: Navigate NZ will never charge students or families. Education guidance shouldn't have a price tag.
about.alwaysIndependentSub: We don't accept money from universities, tutoring companies, or admissions consultants. Our advice is unbiased.
about.alwaysHonestSub: We tell you what you need to hear, not what sounds good. No false promises, no hype.
about.helpSub: Navigate NZ is a community effort. Here are a few ways you can make a difference.
about.getInTouchSub: Have a question, want to help, or just want to say kia ora? We'd love to hear from you.
about.name: Name

guideBanner: Free guide · No account required · Share with anyone

footer.nonprofit: Navigate NZ is a registered nonprofit. We will never charge for access, sell your data, or accept advertising.
footer.tagline: A community project built with aroha in Aotearoa

language.switchNote: Translations are AI-assisted. Help us improve them.
